{"base_rev":"2313acb45e79a75d7b9ed0c71f2d9c3a3d3feba7","classification":"timeout","detail":"mixed_commit_and_no_changes_rationale","rationale":"Implementation evidence exists and focused decoder tests reportedly pass, but the attempt could not complete the required full-package verification because `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/...` hung in an existing `TestWorkLoop_IdlePassClosesEpicClosureCandidates` path while waiting in a git subprocess.","recommended_action":"release_claim_wait_retry","result_rev":"4d5b2931d7e2835cce3cf605b7eb7e14c036c51c","session_id":"eb-433697b0","status":"execution_failed","suggested_amendments":[],"suggested_followup_beads":[{"title":"Fix agent full-package test hang in epic closure idle path","description":"PROBLEM
`cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/...` can hang in the existing `TestWorkLoop_IdlePassClosesEpicClosureCandidates` path while `ddxroot.headExists` waits inside a git subprocess, preventing unrelated beads from completing required package-level verification.

ROOT CAUSE
The failing attempt for ddx-2502d3c6 reported the hang in the agent package test path during full-package verification. The exact code location needs confirmation from the hanging test stack and `ddxroot.headExists` call chain.

PROPOSED FIX
Reproduce the hang with the named test, add bounded subprocess/context handling or test isolation around the `ddxroot.headExists` path, and add regression coverage so the idle-pass epic closure test cannot wait indefinitely.

NON-SCOPE
Do not change pre-claim rewrite acceptance decoding behavior from ddx-2502d3c6.","acceptance":["1. TestWorkLoop_IdlePassClosesEpicClosureCandidates completes reliably without hanging.","2. A regression test or timeout-bound assertion covers the `ddxroot.headExists` git subprocess wait path.","3. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -run TestWorkLoop_IdlePassClosesEpicClosureCandidates -count=1` passes.","4. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/...` passes.","5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes."],"labels":["phase:06-iterate","area:workers","area:agent","kind:bug","kind:reliability"],"parent":"ddx-99d33348"}]}

{"base_rev":"45186bc298da462f16b5494f046395bc861b84b9","classification":"timeout","detail":"mixed_commit_and_no_changes_rationale","rationale":"Implementation evidence exists at result_rev a5bdae7fa9717ab0015ec613304840e4292db858, but the attempt could not complete required verification because the full cli/internal/agent suite hit unrelated integration failures and exceeded the default 10m go test timeout. The bead text itself remains focused; the blocking evidence is verification infrastructure/test-suite instability rather than a malformed bead.","recommended_action":"release_claim_wait_retry","result_rev":"a5bdae7fa9717ab0015ec613304840e4292db858","session_id":"eb-0498efc4","status":"execution_failed","suggested_amendments":[],"suggested_followup_beads":[{"title":"Stabilize agent full-package verification under default timeout","description":"PROBLEM
`cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/...` can fail or exceed the default 10m timeout in unrelated integration paths, including `TestPreDispatchDirtyPreserveRequiresStableImplementationDirt` and `TestWork_ClaudeSubprocessDeathEndToEndRecoversWithin60s`, preventing unrelated beads from completing required package-level verification.

ROOT CAUSE
The ddx-2502d3c6 attempt 20260708T042401-46550bd0 reported these unrelated integration tests failing and the package test run exceeding the default timeout. The exact code-level root cause needs confirmation from the failing test output and stack traces.

PROPOSED FIX
Reproduce the named failures, isolate or bound the slow integration paths, and add regression coverage or test harness fixes so the full agent package suite completes reliably within the default timeout.

NON-SCOPE
Do not change pre-claim rewrite acceptance decoding behavior from ddx-2502d3c6.","acceptance":["1. TestPreDispatchDirtyPreserveRequiresStableImplementationDirt passes reliably under `go test` without requiring an increased package timeout.","2. TestWork_ClaudeSubprocessDeathEndToEndRecoversWithin60s passes reliably under `go test` without requiring an increased package timeout.","3. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... -run "TestPreDispatchDirtyPreserveRequiresStableImplementationDirt|TestWork_ClaudeSubprocessDeathEndToEndRecoversWithin60s" -count=1` passes.","4. `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/...` passes within the default 10m timeout.","5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes."],"labels":["phase:06-iterate","area:workers","area:agent","kind:bug","kind:reliability"],"parent":"ddx-99d33348"}]}
